name: Normie
description: Normie is a CEO & community-driven token launched on the Solana blockchain that is being developed as both a digital asset and a broader lifestyle ecosystem. The project focuses on long-term participation, transparency, and real-world engagement rather than short-term speculation. Normie is designed to coordinate on-chain activity with off-chain initiatives, including physical consumer products, community rewards, and live events. The token acts as a utility and participation mechanism for holders to access rewards, staking programs, giveaways, and future ecosystem features. By combining blockchain infrastructure with tangible experiences and products, Normie aims to explore how decentralized communities can extend beyond purely digital interactions into real-world use cases.
